dashboard.label: AgentSight
dashboard.description: Splunk watches the agents that use Splunk — observability for MCP clients and autonomous agents.

search.query: index=_internal sourcetype=mcp_server rpc_method=tools/call | spath | timechart span=1m count by tool_name

index=_internal sourcetype=mcp_server rpc_method=tools/call | spath | eval duration_ms=round(execution_time_seconds*1000,0) | table _time username tool_name status duration_ms request_id source_ip | sort - _time | head 20
index=agentsight sourcetype=agentsight:case | sort - _time | dedup case_id | table _time case_id trigger_rule severity status actor classification summary | sort - _time

index=agentsight sourcetype=agentsight:case status=awaiting_approval | sort - _time | dedup case_id | spath input=_raw path=pending_action_details{} | table _time case_id actor trigger_rule status pending_actions | sort - _time
